    net/mpich: apply the fix for clang 17 on all OSVERSION

    clang-17 has been MFC’ed: do not check OSVERSION but rather COMPILER_VERSION.

    PR:             276035
    Reported by:    pmc (at) citylink.dinoex.sub.org
